summary: PRED-SR-SUPPRESS detail_reasoning rewritten to explicitly engage with single-observation induction defense. Now acknowledges inductive reasoning is legitimate science, then explains why confirmation would prove repeatability, not dome theory — because no dome equation derives suppression from model constants. Restructured argument: timing concern (nuanced) → induction defense (engaged) → model-derivation test (failed) → literature context (specific) → monitor discrepancy (retained).
